Vylan.meta_title: Vylan: Document collection for accounting firms
Vylan.meta_description: AI-powered document collection for accounting firms. Clients upload through one simple link, and Vylan reads every file as it arrives and follows up automatically until everything's in.
Vylan.hero_headline:
You chased every
document by hand.
Vylan.home_cta_title: From the first request to getting paid.
Vylan.menu_def_text: The backlog of client paperwork your team chases by hand: every receipt, statement and form standing between a messy inbox and a finished file.
Vylan.form_sub: Clients upload through a simple link, Vylan checks each document as it arrives, and follows up automatically until everything's in.
Vylan.form_notes: What's the worst part of document season for you right now?
Vylan.form_done_body: We'll reach out within two business days to set up your inbox and your first chase run.
Vylan.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Vylan.form_error_rate: Too many requests right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
Vylan.feat_1_body: Vylan emails and nudges each client for exactly the documents they still owe, politely, on schedule, without you lifting a finger.
Vylan.feat_2_body: Every upload is read on arrival. Vylan checks it's the right document, the right period, legible, and complete.
Vylan.feat_3_body: Clean documents are checked and ready for you. The wrong ones are auto-rejected with a clear reason, and the client is re-chased.
Vylan.contact_lede: Questions, a demo, or just want to talk shop? Here's how to reach a real person.

VylanHowItWorks.hero_title:
Vylan kills
the client
document chase.
VylanHowItWorks.hero_sub: Built for accountants and bookkeepers. We collect every document, chase what is missing, and get you paid.
VylanHowItWorks.problem_title: Every week, the same hours disappear into chasing clients for paperwork.
VylanHowItWorks.problem_body: Vylan takes the entire chase off your plate, from the first request all the way to getting paid.
VylanHowItWorks.step1_body: No login, no password. They open it and upload their documents. That is the whole experience on their side.
VylanHowItWorks.step2_title: The AI reads every file the moment it lands.
VylanHowItWorks.step2_body: Is it the right document? The right period? Is it legible and complete? Vylan knows before you ever open it.
VylanHowItWorks.step3_title: Vylan follows up so you never have to.
VylanHowItWorks.step3_body: Anything missing, Vylan chases the client automatically, politely, on schedule, until everything is in. You stay out of the back-and-forth.
VylanHowItWorks.step4_title: You review and approve from one dashboard.
VylanHowItWorks.step4_body: The AI assists. The accountant always decides. Nothing is filed or accepted without your sign-off.
VylanHowItWorks.pay_body: When the work is done, your client pays you directly, right from the portal or an emailed invoice link. Connect your Stripe account once, and every payment lands straight in your bank account.
VylanHowItWorks.pay_step2_body: You sign off the work from one dashboard.
VylanHowItWorks.pay_step3_body: The client clicks and pays. Money lands in your bank.
VylanHowItWorks.pay_stat_body: Paying through the portal takes a client under three minutes. A few clicks, and it is done.
VylanHowItWorks.pay_caption: One place, from first request to final payment. No extra tools.
VylanHowItWorks.trust_intro: Sensitive client documents deserve serious handling. Here is how Vylan keeps them safe and keeps you in charge.
VylanHowItWorks.trust_1_body: Clients sign right inside Vylan, no printing or scanning. Every signature carries a tamper-proof audit trail of what was signed, by whom, and when.
VylanHowItWorks.trust_2_body: Hosted in Canada and Law 25 compliant, built on SOC 2 Type II compliant infrastructure. Your data stays where it belongs.
VylanHowItWorks.trust_3_body: Full French and English, end to end, for you and every client.
VylanHowItWorks.trust_4_body: The AI never files or accepts anything on its own. You approve everything.
VylanHowItWorks.wa_body: As documents land and work moves forward, each engagement advances through its stages on its own — collecting, review, preparation, signature, payment. One glance tells you where every client stands.
VylanHowItWorks.wa_empty: Nothing here right now — engagements move in on their own when they reach this stage.
VylanHowItWorks.wa_foot: Try the filters, or press play and watch statuses move on their own — no spreadsheet on the side, no asking your team where things stand.

VylanManifesto.title:
You close the books.
We'll fetch the paper.
VylanManifesto.lede: Accounting didn't get slow because the math is hard. It got slow because the documents never arrive on time, in the right format, or at all.
VylanManifesto.body_1: Every close, every filing, every set of books waits on the same thing: paper that hasn't shown up yet. A bank statement still in someone's inbox. A receipt photographed sideways. A form filled out for the wrong quarter.
VylanManifesto.body_2: So accountants spend their days chasing: emailing, re-emailing, squinting at blurry scans, rejecting the wrong file, asking again. The work that needs judgment gets buried under the work that just needs follow-through.
VylanManifesto.body_3: Vylan does the chasing. It gives each client a simple link, learns exactly what each one still owes, and goes after it, politely, on schedule, without you lifting a finger. It checks every document the moment it lands, flags anything unreadable, the wrong document, or a missing page with a clear reason, and brings the rest to you to approve, then keeps asking until the file is clean.
VylanManifesto.body_4: No more being the bottleneck for your own deadlines. No more spending the most expensive hours of the day on the least valuable task. The chasing is the part a machine should do.
VylanManifesto.kicker:
You close the books.
We'll fetch the paper.

Landing.headline: Stop chasing your clients for documents.
Landing.subhead: A simple, bilingual client portal built for Canadian accounting and bookkeeping firms.
Landing.cta_final_body: Get your firm set up in under two minutes. No credit card. No tutorials. Just a cleaner inbox.
Landing.intro_title: The fastest way to get documents from clients, without the email back-and-forth.
Landing.intro_lede: Vylan turns the messiest part of tax and bookkeeping season into a checklist your client can finish on their phone. You stop sending follow-up emails. They stop forgetting attachments. Everyone moves on.
Landing.benefits_title: Reclaim the hours you spend chasing paperwork.
Landing.benefit_1_body: The average firm we talked to spends 6+ hours a week emailing clients for missing slips. Vylan automates that work to zero.
Landing.benefit_2_body: Magic-link onboarding means clients act in minutes instead of days. Your engagements close on schedule, not on hope.
Landing.benefit_3_body: Claude reads each upload and flags the wrong slip before it reaches your queue. No more re-asking for the right T4.
Landing.feature_1_body: Pick a template (T1, T2, bookkeeping), send a magic link. Your clients log in to nothing.
Landing.feature_2_body: We nudge your clients on your behalf, at the right time, in French or English.
Landing.feature_3_body: Catch when a client uploads the wrong slip before it costs you an hour of email back-and-forth.
Landing.ai_body_long: Every time a client uploads a document, Claude reads it. If it's the wrong slip, the wrong year, a blurry photo, or a missing page, you'll know before it ever lands in your queue, and your client gets a polite, bilingual nudge to fix it. You spend your time on the work that actually pays.
Landing.ai_bullet_1: Spots the wrong document (wrong slip, wrong year, missing page) before it reaches your inbox.
Landing.ai_bullet_2: Catches blurry photos and partial scans, then asks the client to re-take them on their phone.
Landing.ai_bullet_3: Sorts uploads by type (T4, T5, RL slips, receipts) so your queue stays organized for you.
Landing.ai_bullet_4: Sends the retry request automatically: no extra clicks, no chasing.
Landing.ai_v2_card_callout_body: Claude confirmed the right slip, the right year, and a clean scan. Filed and ready for tax prep.
Landing.ai_v2_title: When it's right, it just flows
Landing.ai_v2_body: When the upload checks out, Claude tags it, files it, and lets your client know it landed. No follow-ups, no re-asking, no second-guessing. The slip is exactly where you need it when you sit down to do the return.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_1: Confirms the document type, year, and image quality the moment it's uploaded.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_2: Auto-tags and files it in the right client folder for the season.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_3: Sends the client a bilingual confirmation so they know you got it.
Landing.ai_v2_bullet_4: Frees you up for the actual tax work instead of chasing paperwork.
Landing.step_1_title: Sign up in under a minute
Landing.step_1_body: No card required. Add a few clients, pick a template, you're ready.
Landing.step_2_body: Your client clicks once, uploads their slips on their phone. No password, no app to download.
Landing.step_3_body: AI flags the wrong document before you have to. You spend your time on actual accounting work.
Landing.faq_1_q: Do my clients need to create an account?
Landing.faq_1_a: No. They click the magic link in the email you send and they're on their personal portal. The link is private and expires in 90 days.
Landing.faq_2_q: Is the data stored in Canada?
Landing.faq_2_a: Vylan is built around Canadian privacy law: PIPEDA and Quebec's Law 25. We're happy to walk through our specific data-processing setup (subprocessors, storage region, transfer disclosures) on the demo call.
Landing.faq_3_q: What if I want to cancel?
Landing.faq_3_a: Pricing is set during a 15-minute call with the founder right now. We're sizing each firm individually instead of running a fixed plan grid. No annual lock-in. You can stop at any time and we'll help you export everything you've uploaded.
Landing.faq_4_q: Can I import my existing client list?
Landing.faq_4_a: Yes. The /clients page has a CSV import that accepts paste-in or file upload, with column headers in either French or English. Most accounting software exports a compatible CSV.

Settings.auto_request_missing_pages_help: When on, if a client uploads a multi-page document but a specific page is missing, Vylan automatically asks the client to send the missing page. When off, the missing page is flagged for your review instead. If Vylan is unsure which page is missing, it always comes to you, never the client.
Settings.include_quebec_forms_help: On by default. Turn this off if your firm works entirely outside Quebec, and the Quebec-only slips (RL-1, RL-3, and so on) are hidden from every client checklist. When on, those slips still drop automatically for any client whose province is set outside Quebec.

Settings.qbo_connect_step1: Connect your company through Intuit's secure login — you choose the company and approve access (about a minute).
Settings.qbo_connect_step2: Vylan reads your lists — accounts, vendors, customers, tax codes, and products — so it can match each document to the right entries.
Settings.qbo_connect_step3: As receipts and invoices are collected, Vylan's AI reads each one and prepares a draft entry with the vendor or customer, account, tax, amount, and date filled in.
Settings.qbo_connect_step4: You review each draft and approve it — one at a time or in bulk. Nothing is sent to QuickBooks until you do.
Settings.qbo_connect_step5: On approval, Vylan creates the entry in QuickBooks, attaches the receipt to it, and checks your books first so it never posts a duplicate.
Settings.qbo_connect_per_client_note: QuickBooks connects per client. Open a client's page and click Connect QuickBooks to link their books.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.p_acceptance: By creating an account or using Vylan (the "Service"), you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
Terms.p_service: Vylan is a document-collection tool for accounting and bookkeeping firms. Firms create checklists of documents to request; their clients upload those documents through a private-link portal. Vylan stores the documents, checks them with AI, and helps the firm collect signatures, invoice, and get paid.
Terms.p_accounts: You are responsible for keeping your login secure and for everything done under your account. Turn on two-factor login, and tell us at the address below if you think someone else has access.
Terms.p_subscription: New firms start in demo mode with no payment method required. Paid plans are billed monthly in Canadian dollars. Our pricing is currently set through a conversation with each firm rather than a fixed public price, and we will agree on it with you before any charge. On a paid plan you can cancel at any time from your settings, and the cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
Terms.p_data: You own the documents and information you and your clients put into Vylan. You give us permission to host, process, and display that data only to run the Service for you. We never sell it, and we never use your clients' documents for anything other than providing the Service.

Terms.p_intellectual: Vylan — its design, code, and content, other than your own data — belongs to us. You may not copy, resell, or reverse-engineer it without our written permission.
Terms.p_termination: You can stop using Vylan at any time, and we can end this agreement if these terms are broken. Either way, you can export your data for 30 days after the account closes; after that, we delete it.
Terms.p_warranty: We work hard to keep Vylan running and accurate, but the Service is provided "as is," without warranties of any kind. Vylan is a tool that helps you collect and manage documents; it does not provide tax, accounting, or legal advice, and you remain responsible for your professional work. Privacy.title: Privacy Notice
Privacy.p_overview: This notice explains what personal information Vylan collects, why, where it lives, and the rights you and your clients have over it. It is written for Canadian accounting and bookkeeping firms and reflects Quebec's Law 25 (the Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector) and Canada's PIPEDA.
Privacy.p_what_we_collect:
Account information: your firm's name, your name, and your email address.
Client information your firm enters: each client's name, email, phone number, language, and any notes you add.
Documents your clients upload: tax slips, statements, receipts, and any other files you request.
Usage information: which pages were viewed, plus your IP address and browser type, kept for security.
Privacy.p_why:
To run the service: send the private-link portal, store and deliver documents to your firm, send automatic email reminders, and check uploads with AI.
To bill firms on a paid plan.
To keep the service secure and to improve it.
To meet our legal obligations.
Privacy.p_ai: Two parts of Vylan use AI, each with a different provider. When a client uploads a document, it is sent to OpenAI to read and classify it — to check it is the right document, readable, and for the right year. Vylan's chat assistants — the in-app help assistant and the per-engagement assistant — run on Anthropic (Claude). Each provider processes this data only to answer that request, and we do not permit them to use it to train their models. Both are based in the United States; they appear in the subprocessor list below.
Privacy.p_law25: We have a person responsible for the protection of personal information, reachable at the contact address below. New firms start with privacy settings at their most protective, and we will tell you before we use your information for any purpose beyond the ones described here.
Privacy.p_residency: Your clients' documents and the information about them are stored in a Canadian region (Supabase, ca-central-1). Some services we rely on operate in the United States: email delivery, payment processing, and the AI providers above. Emails never contain document content — only a link back to the portal.
Privacy.p_sharing: We do not sell personal information, and we never will. We share it only with the subprocessors listed below, and only as far as each one needs to do its job.
Privacy.p_subprocessors:
Supabase — hosting, database, and file storage. Canada.
OpenAI — reads and classifies uploaded documents. United States.
Anthropic — powers the in-app chat assistants. United States.
Resend — sends transactional and reminder emails. United States.
Stripe — processes payments. United States and Canada.
Privacy.p_security: Data is encrypted in storage and in transit. Access to a firm's data is enforced at the database level, so one firm can never reach another's. Document downloads use links that expire quickly. You can turn on two-factor login for your own account.
Privacy.p_retention: We keep your data while your account is active. A deleted engagement stays recoverable for 30 days, then it and its files are permanently removed. You can export everything your firm holds at any time. If you close your firm's account, we delete its data within 24 hours of your request.
Privacy.p_rights:
See the personal information we hold about you.
Correct it if it is wrong.
Delete it, or export it to take it elsewhere.
Withdraw your consent to a use of it.
Complain to Quebec's Commission d'accès à l'information or the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada.
Privacy.p_breach: If a security incident affects your personal information, we will notify the affected firms and the appropriate authority, as the law requires.
Privacy.p_contact: Questions about this notice, or a request about your personal information, go to {email}.
